info.description: This is an API for AIDMS 2.0
info.title: AIDMS 2.0 API

get.description: Proxy frontend requests to Grafana to avoid CORS and mixed content issues

put.description: Proxy frontend requests to Grafana to avoid CORS and mixed content issues

post.description: Proxy frontend requests to Grafana to avoid CORS and mixed content issues

delete.description: Proxy frontend requests to Grafana to avoid CORS and mixed content issues

get.description: Retrieve the current system license information.

post.description: Upload a new license file to the system. Only administrators can upload licenses.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or license file format

post.description: Authenticate user and return access token and refresh token.
User logout, clear authentication cookies.

get.description: Get a list of all models with pagination and filtering.

post.description: Upload a model chunk file.

409.description: Disk quota exceeded

get.description: Download a model chunk file.

409.description: Disk quota exceeded

delete.description: Delete uploaded chunks by upload file ID

post.description: Create a model from uploaded chunks.
Create a model from a local file path.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or file not found

delete.description: Delete a model by its ID.

get.description: Download a model file by its ID using WebSocket protocol.
Retrieve a list of nodes. Supports pagination, filtering, and sorting.

parameters.description: Filter conditions in JSON string, e.g. {\
parameters.name: filters

post.description: Add new nodes to the system. Each node requires hostname, IP, and credentials.

delete.description: Remove multiple nodes from the system. This action will release all resources associated with the nodes.

get.description: Retrieve a detailed breakdown of node disk usage.

post.description: Initialize system information for a node. This is an internal API used by nodes to register themselves.
Synchronize node resources from the underlying infrastructure. This is an internal API for resource management.

get.description: Get installation or removal logs for a specific node. Log type is automatically determined based on node status. Supports tailing and following.

parameters.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs
parameters.name: tail

404.description: Node or log file not found

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific node by its ID.
Get detailed resource allocation information for a specific node including CPU, memory, disk, and GPU usage.

patch.description: Update GPU usage status for a specific node. This sets which GPUs are currently in use.

200.description: Warning: GPUs being removed are currently used by projects

401.description: Unauthorized - User is not system admin

409.description: Resource conflict - GPU bindings exceed license limit

get.description: Retrieve a list of projects. Supports pagination, filtering, and sorting.

parameters.description: Filter conditions in JSON string, e.g. {\
parameters.name: filters

post.description: Create a new project. Required fields: name. Optional: description.

get.description: Get project details by project ID. You can specify which fields to include in the response.

parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to include in the response
parameters.name: fields

get.description: Get detailed resource allocation information for a specific project including CPU, memory, disk, and GPU usage.
Retrieve a list of users associated with the specified project. Supports pagination and filtering.
Retrieve a list of datasets in the current project. Supports pagination, filtering, and sorting.

parameters.description: Filter conditions in JSON string, e.g. {\
parameters.name: filters

post.description: Create a new dataset in the current project with support for various data types and AI tasks.

409.description: Dataset name already exists

get.description: Retrieve the list of available dataset types supported by the system.
Retrieve the list of available AI tasks for a specific dataset type.

post.description: Upload image files and their corresponding label files to a dataset.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or file format

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific dataset by its ID.

post.description: Make a dataset public so it can be accessed by other projects.

put.description: Update the resource allocation for a dataset.

get.description: Retrieve a list of versions for a specific dataset. Supports pagination, filtering, and sorting.

post.description: Create a new version of a dataset by committing the current changes.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific dataset version by its ID.

parameters.description: Fields to include in the response, separated by commas (e.g., id,name)
parameters.name: fields

get.description: Download the archive file of a specific dataset version.
Retrieve the list of files for a specific dataset version.
Download a specific file from a dataset version.
Get a list of instance jobs with pagination and filtering. Returns job information including model tag and description.

post.description:
Create a new instance job with specified resources and disk quota.
Instance jobs are long-running interactive containers that users can access through mapped ports.
The API uses a hybrid processing model: synchronous phase allocates resources,
while asynchronous phase creates the actual Kubernetes pod and configures network ports.

409.description: Conflict

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific job by its ID.

parameters.description: Fields to include in the response, separated by commas (e.g., id,name,status,job_type,model,node,datasets,user)
parameters.name: fields

delete.description: Delete a job by its ID.

409.description: Job is running and cannot be deleted

post.description: Commit a job to create a model from the job's output. The committed model will have a new tag and optional description.

409.description: Job is not in a committable state or tag already exists

get.description:
Get the kubectl-describe-style text output for the job's pod, including Events.
Useful for diagnosing errors not visible in pod logs (e.g. FailedScheduling, ImagePullBackOff, OOMKilled).

404.description: Job not found or Pod not found

get.description: Get the pod logs for a job. Supports streaming via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

parameters.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs (default: all)
parameters.name: tail

parameters.description: Get logs from the previous terminated container (default: false)
parameters.name: previous

404.description: Job not found or Pod not found

get.description: Get the pod name for a job.

put.description: Update the resource configuration for a job.

409.description: Job is running and cannot be updated

post.description: Start a job by its ID.

409.description: Job is not in a startable state

post.description: Stop a running job by its ID.

409.description: Job is not in a stoppable state

head.description: Get model chunk metadata in project context.

delete.description: Delete a model in the current project by its ID.

get.description: Download a model file by its ID.
Download a model file by its ID using WebSocket protocol.

patch.description: Update project name and/or description (partial update). Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Delete a dataset by its ID. Only project administrators can delete datasets.

post.description: Clone a dataset version to create a new dataset and its first version.
post.summary: Clone dataset version as new dataset and dataset version

get.description: Retrieve file group information for a specific dataset version by files ID.
get.summary: Get dataset version files by ID

get.description: Retrieve a summary of labels for a specific dataset version.
Download the metadata file of a specific dataset version.

delete.description: Force delete a project and all its associated resources. This action cannot be undone.

patch.description: Update job name and/or description (partial update). Only provided fields will be updated.
Update job name and/or description (partial update). Only provided fields will be updated.

put.description: Update resource allocation for a specific project including CPU, memory, disk, and GPU resources.

post.description: Add a user to a specific project with a specified role.

delete.description: Remove a user from a specific project.

patch.description: Change the role of a user in a specific project.

post.description: Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token (from cookie).
Trigger Harbor Garbage Collection to clean up deleted artifacts and reclaim disk space.

get.description: Download a system model file by its ID. System models are pre-built models available to all users.
Download a system model file by its ID using WebSocket protocol.
Retrieve a list of users. Supports pagination, filtering, and sorting.

parameters.description: Filter conditions in JSON string, e.g. {\
parameters.name: filters

post.description: Create a new user account. Only system administrators can create users.

409.description: User already exists

get.description: Retrieve the list of languages available for user interface localization.
Retrieve information of the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve detailed information of a specific user by their ID.

delete.description: Delete a user account. Only administrators can delete users.

patch.description: Update user information. Only administrators can update other users.
Change the locale (language) of a user. Only the user or administrators can change the locale.
Change the display name of a user. Only the user or administrators can change the name.
Change the password of a user. Only the user or administrators can change the password.

get.description: Retrieve all projects that a specific user has access to.

description.example: Dataset for image classification containing 1000 images
